title.en: Then, Ye Tian annihilated his body.

content.en:
Ye Tian sent out a lot of resources, eternal source objects, and ancient star stones, and let the main body be brought back to the Void Source Palace.

Subsequently, he began to announce the closure. No one is allowed to disturb him.

Then, Ye Tian annihilated his body.

After all, this replica body was an ancient star clan, and it couldn't leave the Star Ancient Domain, and the Supreme couldn't enter the Star Ancient Domain.

So, he can only come out this way.

......

Hall of Void Source.

Ye Tian's body, copy body, and clone all appeared here.

The copied body copied by Ye Tian and the clone that was re-condensed are all in the realm of the Supreme One, so if the cultivation is consistent, the fusion of the eternal body can be carried out.

In the following years, Ye Tian began to copy his body and fuse his clone again and again.

One is the Endless Eternal, and the other is the Ancient Star Eternal.

Ye Tian was very unfamiliar with the fusion of the Eternals at first, even if he was a powerhouse like the Star Clan, he had little experience in the fusion of the Eternals, so everything needed Ye Tian to explore by himself.

The failures again and again did not hit Ye Tian, but allowed Ye Tian to accumulate enough experience.

But with the number of failures, whether it is a copy of the body or a clone, the foundation of potential has been greatly affected.

Until the copy body and the clone tried to fuse the eternal body many times, and the body could no longer bear the price of fusion, he directly disintegrated his copy body and clone, recondensed the copy body, made a breakthrough in cultivation, and transformed into a clone.

Then, let the replica body and the clone go through the Eternals fusion experiment again.

It can be said that every time he recondenses the copy body and creates a clone, the resource price he pays is very large, but Ye Tian can afford it, after all, he has harvested all the resources of the Ancient Star Clan, which is equivalent to obtaining all the property of an eternal heaven and earth!

What a wealth he wasted again and again.

Moreover, the Void Source Ancestor also had a lot of resources left, so he was not afraid of the consumption of resources.

Before you know it, hundreds of great tribulations have passed.

Ye Tian has spent countless resources, I don't know how many times he has tried, and now he has full experience in the fusion of the eternal body, and the entire Yuan Sea is afraid that he will not be able to find a supreme person with the same experience as him.

this day.

Ye Tian began to fuse again, and this time he had a lot of confidence that he would be able to fuse successfully.

"Let's get started!"

The two bodies turned into two balls of energy and began to fuse together, and the Ancient Star Eternals and the Endless Eternals assimilated little by little, transforming into the same fusion.

Time passed like this, and I don't know how long it had passed, and the two eternals finally fused together.

At the same time, the two bodies also turned into one.

The fused Eternals are very powerful, but they still do not go beyond the scope of the superior Eternals.

Ye Tian naturally knew the reason, because the Ancient Star Eternal Body was not in a perfect state, after all, he didn't want to waste resources to cultivate the Eternal Ancient Star Body to a perfect state and fuse it again and again.

But now, the experiment was successful, and he was ready to truly cultivate the Ancient Star Eternal Body to perfection from the beginning, cultivate step by step to the Supreme Realm, and then try to fuse with the Supreme Replica Body of the Perfect Endless Eternal Body.

And if you want to perfect the Ancient Star Eternals to the most perfect level, it is not easy to do, and it will take a long time.

In the following days, Ye Tian spent all of his time perfecting the Ancient Star Eternal, perfecting step by step, and modifying one defect after another.

As the years passed, the defects of the ancient star became less and less, and the power of the ancient star eternals became stronger and stronger.

Finally, on this day, the Ancient Star Eternals were flawless, and there was no longer a single flaw.

At this time, the ancient star eternal body is the truly perfect upper-level eternal, combined with the flawless median eternal, the endless eternal, once fused, the new eternals will inevitably be able to break the shackles of the upper-level eternals and be promoted to a new eternals level.

For a long time, Ye Tian's Ancient Star Clan clone had grown to the Supreme Realm, consuming a lot of resources.

Subsequently, Ye Tian once again fused the Gu Xing clan clone and the copy and replication together.

However, there was a little mistake this time, but it had little impact, Ye Tian summed up his experience, and after recovering the injuries of the Gu Star Clan's clone and the copy body, he continued to fuse.

In this way, after repeated attempts, he once again succeeded in fusing the Gu Star clone with the copy body.

I have to say that after the fusion, the new eternal body formed this time did indeed surpass the upper eternal body.

And this kind of eternal body that surpasses the superior eternal body, there is also a name in the source sea, called the legendary level eternal body, which means that it belongs to legends, but no supreme person has ever seen it.

Succeeded only once, Ye Tian would not immediately let the body try.

He needs to be 100% successful, he can't afford to make mistakes, even if he wastes a lot of eternal sources and resources.

Fortunately, the Ancient Star Stone, an Eternal Source Artifact, was indeed terrifying, allowing Ye Tian to draw the Origin again and again, and the consumption was not very large, so he could continue to make an Ancient Star Clan's Supreme Clone.

After Ye Tian disintegrated the fusion body, he continued to create a Supreme Clone and fused the eternal body again.

This time, Ye Tian only failed three times, and he successfully fused the two eternal bodies.

Subsequently, Ye Tian continued this fusion.

After many fusions, Ye Tian was already able to ensure a 100% success rate, and only then was he ready to let the Gu Xing Clan's body and body fuse.

......

Void Source Palace, Origin Space.

Ye Tian adjusted his state and began to fuse.

Whether it is the main body or the body of the ancient star clan, the cultivation is in the realm of the Supreme One, and they are all perfect eternal bodies.

The fusion began, and there was no rejection between the two bodies, and the fusion process went smoothly.

After a long time, the two bodies fused perfectly into one body, and the two eternals completely transformed into a new eternal.

"This kind of legendary-level eternal body is still called the endless eternal body, after all, the name Gu Xing belongs to the Star Ancestor, I don't like to use this name!"

Ye Tian muttered.

With the brand-new Endless Eternal Body, a legendary-level Eternal Body, Ye Tian's strength is a little bit stronger than in the past!

With the same level of combat power, he didn't know how much he surpassed the Void Source Clan.

Moreover, the Endless Eternal Body, which is fused with the Ancient Star Eternal, has a terrifying ability to save its life.

Ye Tian was almost a true immortal at this moment, even if his strength was far superior to his supreme, there was no way to kill him.

Although he was only in the realm of the First Supreme One, his real combat power was at least not weaker than the body of the Ancient Star Clan in the realm of the Triple Supreme One.

It is conceivable that once he grows to the realm of the Triple Supreme, his combat power will at least be comparable to that of some six or seven supreme beings.
